# doc2md

> Browser-only document to Markdown conversion. Files stay local in the normal flow.

## Core docs

- [README](./README.md)
- [Architecture](./docs/architecture.md)
- [Product Spec](./docs/product-spec.md)
- [Testing](./docs/testing.md)
- [Provenance](./docs/provenance.md)
- [License](./LICENSE)

## Notes for LLMs

- This project is intentionally client-side first and privacy-forward.
- Do not infer a backend, worker, queue, or API surface from this repo unless such code is explicitly added later.
- PDF support is best-effort and text-first, not OCR.
